title: 38mm Satin Ribbon Yellow in 5 Meters for Gifts Wrap Sewing, Party, Home Decorations, Events, Dress, Wedding Christmas, Crafts, Bows Car, Floral, Balloons Hairs, DIY, Bouquets, Cake More
features: Yellow Satin Ribbon Size 38mm 1-1/2'' inch 3.8cm Wide, 5 Meters, Single Faced, Woven Edge Machine Washable
Crafted from 100% polyester, this premium-grade ribbon features a single-faced satin finish; it has a smooth, lustrous surface that enhances tactile appeal; ideal for a variety of craft projects

Many Colours available: Red; White; Black; Green; Yellow; Orange; Gold; Silver; Brown; Maroon; Light Pink; Purple; Blue; Navy Blue; Peach; Maroon; Teal Blue; Cream; Lilac; Hot Pink; Fuchsia; Olive Green; Pale Green; Light Blue and more

This Yellow Satin ribbon is ideal for making your own wedding stationery & favours, hand made cards and craft projects. As can be seen in the photographs, the ribbon has a smooth finish with a beautiful sheen

Suitable for your Scrapbook, bookmarks, gift cards, ribbon bows, Decoration on lampshade, teddy bears, hair accessories, bags, baby pram, basket handle, champagne glasses Shoes, handbags, ribbon embroidery, ribbon bracelet, make ribbons for top of gift boxes, make ribbon bows / rosebuds and many more things
description: Our Yellow Satin RIBBON is made with the finest materials and expert craftsmanship. This single-sided satin ribbon is carefully woven to perfection, ensuring a luxurious and elegant finish for all your projects. Versatile and Stylish: With its smooth texture and lustrous sheen, our RIBBON is perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Whether you're embellishing gift boxes, crafting hair accessories, or creating beautiful decorations, this satin ribbon will elevate your designs to the next level. Wide Range of Colors: Choose from a vibrant selection of colors to suit any project or theme.
